response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and solid software craftsmanship practices, but the resume shows minimal hands-on Java/Kotlin/JVM work and no Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience. The only IDE-adjacent role (National Instruments LabWindows/CVI) was in C/C++ over a decade ago. The gap between current expertise and the required JVM/Spring/IDE-internals focus is too large for a mid-senior IC hire.
strengths: Long track record on complex systems and large-scale codebases across multiple domains
Strong testing/craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring dojos, workshops)
Prior experience building IDE components at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
Java/Kotlin listed only as skills with no recent substantive JVM project work
No evidence of language tooling or modern IDE internals experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of Spring/JVM enterprise framework experience
